svg.text: LOW-LATENCY MODEL ROUTER · SCORE BREAKDOWN BY PRIORITY MODE
• Latency normalized: model_lat / max_lat in candidate set
• Weights auto-normalized to sum=1.0 via RoutingWeights.normalize()
(higher bar = model more likely to be selected)
Low-Latency Model Router · All scores are normalized within the candidate set · Weights auto-sum to 1.0
